#nullable enable

namespace Microsoft.AspNetCore.Generated.Attributes;

/// <summary>
/// Specifies the allowed hosts for the annotated endpoint or class.
/// </summary>
[global::System.AttributeUsage(global::System.AttributeTargets.Class | global::System.AttributeTargets.Method, Inherited = false, AllowMultiple = false)]
[global::System.CodeDom.Compiler.GeneratedCodeAttribute("GeneratedEndpoints.MinimalApiGenerator", "10.0.5.0")]
[global::System.Diagnostics.CodeAnalysis.ExcludeFromCodeCoverageAttribute]
internal sealed class RequireHostAttribute : global::System.Attribute
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Initializes a new instance of the <see cref="RequireHostAttribute"/> class.
    /// </summary>
    /// <param name="hosts">The hosts that are allowed to access the endpoint.</param>
    public RequireHostAttribute(params string[] hosts)
    {
        Hosts = hosts ?? global::System.Array.Empty<string>();
    }

    /// <summary>
    /// Gets the allowed hosts.
    /// </summary>
    public string[] Hosts { get; }
}
